name: Chocolate Cherry Cake 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Butter and flour a bundt pan or 10-inch tube pan.
2. In a bowl, combine the flour, sugar, oil, eggs, vanilla, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt. Mix well.
3. Stir in the cherries and their liquid, chocolate chips, and nuts.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for about 1 hour, until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Cool on a rack and remove from the pan to cool completely.
6. To serve, sprinkle with confectioners sugar if desired.
Serves 16
